free_text: Angular distribution of alpha particles from the
Oxygen gas (~5 to 7 mmHg) filled in reaction chamber,
which is separated from the generator vacuum system
by an Al2O3 film (0.15 u thick, 5 mm diam.).
Two Au-Si barrier counters having  resolution
One turned from 30 deg to 150 deg, and the other one
fixed at 90 deg as beam monitor.
Absolute energy scale was calibrated by
Charge collection by Faraday cylinder and
